column8:
The technical interview was two rounds
1st round was they gave voltage divider circuit , explain your project,sensors and some analog related questions 
In 2nd round they gave 5-6 circuits and asked to calculate voltage,current,voltage across diode, derive voltage equation and asked to draw pnp and npn transistor symbols,gave npn transistor circuit and asked to find Vbe voltage across resistor and opamp parameters,sr flip flop circuit.
